scripts.preinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend/channel-services/whatsapp-mcp && npm install --prefix backend/channel-services/sms-mcp && npm install --prefix backend/channel-services/email-rcs-mcp
scripts.build: npm run --prefix backend build && npm run --prefix frontend build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:whatsapp" "npm run dev:sms" "npm run dev:email"
